title: DINOForge Economy Profile Definition
description: Schema for DINOForge economy profile files that define per-faction economic parameters including starting resources, production bonuses, trade modifiers, and worker efficiency.

id.description: Unique identifier for this economy profile.

display_name.description: Human-readable name for this economy profile.

description.description: Optional description of this economy profile's play style.

starting_resources.description: Initial resource stockpiles when a faction begins with this profile.

production_multipliers.description: Per-resource production rate multipliers. Default 1.0 for unlisted resources.

consumption_multipliers.description: Per-resource consumption rate multipliers. Values < 1.0 reduce consumption.

trade_rate_modifier.description: Global trade exchange rate modifier. < 1.0 gives better rates; > 1.0 gives worse rates.

trade_cooldown_modifier.description: Trade cooldown duration modifier. < 1.0 reduces cooldown between trades.

storage_multiplier.description: Storage capacity multiplier for all resource types.

building_cost_modifier.description: Construction cost multiplier for economy buildings.

worker_efficiency.description: Worker productivity multiplier in production buildings.
